testcase.name: test_override_eats_margin_returns_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_automation_engine_v361.py:297: in test_override_eats_margin_returns_400 assert r.status_code in (400, 404), f"Expected 400, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 200: {"ok":true,"id":"41a71e09-1e09-4a9f-ae7b-fe71a5f67554","kind":"promotion","code":""} E assert 200 in (400, 404) E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
